settings.text: A neighborhood restaurant celebrating local flavors, seasonal ingredients, and the art of gathering around a shared table.

settings.title: Opening Hours
settings.text:
Monday — Thursday: 5 PM – 10 PM
Friday — Saturday: 5 PM – 11 PM
Sunday: 10 AM – 3 PM (Brunch)
Sunday: 5 PM – 9 PM (Dinner)
